clauses.title: Standard Clause 1
clauses.text: This is standard clause text for section 1. It details the obligations and responsibilities under normal operating conditions.

clauses.title: Standard Clause 3
clauses.text: Vendor invoices are payable strictly within 30 days of receipt.

clauses.title: Standard Clause 7
clauses.text: All payments require a 45-day review period before funds can be released.

execution_scenarios.title: Clean Overlap
execution_scenarios.description: Manager approves timesheet with normal override.

execution_scenarios.title: Direct Crash
execution_scenarios.description: Vendor submits invoice on day 30, but finance system is locked.
